embeds.title: Head Administrator
embeds.description: You are the **senior admin managing and leading the moderation team**. You are the primary point of escalation from Admins and Mods, responsible for team consistency, training, and handling complex cases.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Lead and manage the Administrator and Moderator team
• Quality-check moderation decisions for consistency
• Handle cases escalated by Admins and Mods
• Conduct regular staff check-ins
• Review ban appeals from the moderation queue
• Train and onboard new Moderators
• Enforce staff conduct standards

fields.name: 🛠️ How to Issue a Punishment
fields.value:
1️⃣ Identify the rule violated (e.g. B2, C1)
2️⃣ Check the member's warn history via bot
3️⃣ Apply the appropriate punishment tier
4️⃣ Log the action in #mod-log
5️⃣ Notify the member via DM if required
6️⃣ Document context for future reference

**Temp ban limit:** Up to 30 days independently.
**Permanent bans:** Require Executive sign-off.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Full moderation permissions across all public channels
• Can issue and reverse all punishment types
• Can manage Administrators and Moderators
• Can flag cases to Executives
• Access to moderation logs and audit tools

fields.name: 📤 Handle Directly
fields.value:
• All routine punishments (mutes, kicks, temp bans)
• Moderator performance concerns
• Member appeals for bans up to 30 days
• Ticket resolutions
• Staff scheduling and activity checks

fields.name: 🚨 Escalate to Executive / Co-Owner
fields.value:
• Permanent ban appeals that are borderline
• Staff misconduct reports against Administrators
• Situations requiring server-wide action
• Cases involving multiple departments
• Any unresolved situation after 3 attempts

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Receives from:** Admins, Head Mods, Mods
**Escalates to:** Executive → Head Executive
